label_verbatim: (Name of Maine or Foreign Limited Liability Company)
rationale: Name of the LLC. Form serves both domestic and foreign LLCs (label says 'for Maine or Foreign LLC'). Per the entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction convention, foreign filings normally use entity.home_jurisdiction_name — but a fictitious-name termination is a Maine-record filing (terminating a Maine registration), so entity.name (the Maine-record name) is the appropriate handle. Synth/rubric for foreign LLCs should populate entity.name from entity.home_jurisdiction_name.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The limited liability company intends to terminate the assumed or fictitious name of
rationale: The specific assumed/fictitious name being terminated. Same key family as MLLP-5A (sibling LLP termination form) — both forms terminate a previously filed Statement of Intention under analogous 31 MRSA chapters.
Signing date of the termination statement.

label_verbatim: Authorized Person(s)* — slot 1 — (signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity for authorized-person signer slot 1 — Shape D per filing-signer-shape convention. Multi-slot extension of filing.signer.* (filing.signer_N.* indexed list when the form provides multiple parallel signer slots; analogous to MLLP-6A's partner_N.* but for the generic LLC 'authorized person' role rather than the role-specific 'partner' role). Wet-ink (signature) line has no AcroForm widget.
